name: 残酷的达里尔（穷鬼）| 专业人士
nameEn: Bloody Darryl The Strapped | The Professionals
nameZh: 残酷的达里尔（穷鬼）| 专业人士
descriptionEn: Before he was leader of the heist gang 'The Professionals' Sir Bloody Darryl was more simply called, Bloody Darryl. Still your friendly neighborhood psychopath in every sense of the word. Not actually Australian according to Australians. I'm just gonna give them a bit of Razzle Dazzle.
descriptionZh: 在他成为抢劫团伙\"专业人士\"首领之前，残酷的达里尔爵士简称为“残酷的达里尔”。从各种意义上讲，他仍是你的好邻居兼精神病患者。据澳洲人所说，实际上他并不是澳洲人。 我只是要给他们来点花式炫技。

name: “蓝莓” 铅弹 | 海军水面战中心海豹部队
nameZh: “蓝莓” 铅弹 | 海军水面战中心海豹部队
descriptionEn: Known as SEAL Team's \"Weapons Sommelier\" Buckshot has thoroughly field-tested and reviewed almost every available military weapon in staggering depth. ST6 relies on Buckshot's knowledge of lesser-known guns for edge case advantages in ground based operations. Seen here sporting the classic NUE Type 1 uniform otherwise known as 'blueberries'. They talk to me. The guns. They have feelings.
descriptionZh: 作为海豹部队的“武器品鉴师”，铅弹已经全面而细致地评测过几乎所有可用的军事武器。海豹突击队第六分队依靠其在小众枪支领域中的知识，频频在地面作战行动中取得优势。 他身上的这件经典款NUE1型制服又被称为“蓝莓”。 枪是有灵性的，能与我沟通。

name: “两次”麦考伊 | 战术空中管制部队装甲兵
nameZh: “两次”麦考伊 | 战术空中管制部队装甲兵
descriptionEn: 'Two Times' McCoy earned his nickname by completing TACP's field training twice. Official records mark this up to a scheduling mix-up, but his teammates report restraining him from completing the trifecta. With inhuman reserves of physical and mental stamina, McCoy often finds himself the last person standing at the end of any conflict—physical and verbal alike. His yellow scarf is a tribute to his time with 1st Cavalry Division. Yep. Still here.
descriptionZh: 在海豹部队完成两次臭名昭著的地狱周末训练后，麦考伊被人取了个外号。不太确定是出于安排上的混乱，还是说他享受这个过程。 总之，麦考伊拥有超出常人的体力和意志力。他常常发现，自己就是那个总能在各种打斗中坚持到最后一刻的人。他的黄领巾是对他在第一骑兵师的纪念。 没错，他还在。

name: 指挥官 梅 “极寒” 贾米森 | 特警
nameZh: 指挥官 梅 “极寒” 贾米森 | 特警
descriptionEn: Cmdr. 'Dead Cold' Jamison has just about seen it all. Skeptical and wry in the midst of deadly combat, others could mistake her for being nonchalant about the chaos at hand. They would be wrong. Nothing gets past Dead Cold, not bad guys with AK-47s, junior officers that call her 'Ma'am,' or an opportunity to make elite officers smirk under pressure. You're gonna find out.
descriptionZh: 指挥官梅“极寒”贾米森已经看穿了一切。由于她常在重要行动中表现出挖苦和刻薄态度，人们总误以为她是那种无法控制混乱局面的人。但其实他们错了，没有什么可以逃出这位指挥官的法眼，尤其是那些手持AK-47的坏蛋。每当那些年轻下级军官称呼她为“女士”时，她队伍里的精英队员们都会忍俊不禁，这算是高压生活下的一点小乐趣吧。 你们终究会懂我的。

name: 第一中尉法洛 | 特警
nameZh: 第一中尉法洛 | 特警
descriptionEn: Smart as a whip and relentlessly polite, 1st Lieutenant Farlow is one of the most beloved and respected officers in SWAT. A master tactician in hostage and barricade situations, Farlow quickly climbed the SWAT ranks. Don't be fooled by her overwhelmingly cheerful nature--she can dispatch bad guys in the blink of an eye and not think twice about it. What are they doing over there? Drinking milkshakes?
descriptionZh: 第一中尉法洛是一个彬彬有礼的小机灵鬼，她是特警队里最受欢迎、最受爱戴的军官之一。法洛被称为障碍排除及解救人质的战术大师，这让她很快在队内得到提拔。不要被她天性开朗的外表所欺骗，她可是拥有能在一瞬间搞定敌人的本领，行动果敢而迅速。 他们在那里搞什么呢？喝奶昔？！

name: 约翰 “范·海伦” 卡斯克 | 特警
nameZh: 约翰 “范·海伦” 卡斯克 | 特警
descriptionEn: John 'Van Healen' Kask is one of SWATs best tactical defence units and on-site military paramedics. He also shreds a mean guitar—sometimes mid-operation. He says it helps get his teammates' blood pumping just as effectively as an AED, which he keeps ready in case of emergency. I can bring you back to life, but I can't make you live.
descriptionZh: 约翰 “范·海伦” 卡斯克是特警队中最好的战术防卫及现场护理专员之一。他弹得一手好吉他——有时，甚至在任务行动中也不放弃演奏…… 据他说，在行动中弹吉能令队友兴奋起来，起到体外除颤器的作用，所以他常年随身携带吉他，以备不时之需。 我可以让你起死回生，但不包括我的敌人。

name: 生物防害专家 | 特警
nameZh: 生物防害专家 | 特警
descriptionEn: The SWAT's Biological Hazard Specialists are trained to handle worst case bio warfare situations. Terrorists planning to unleash a bio hazard attack upon unsuspecting civilians do not want to deal with these guys. Tacita Sed Mortiferum.
descriptionZh: 这位特警队里的生物防害专家，接受过培训，可以处理哪怕最坏情况的生物战。对于那些计划向毫无戒备的普通百姓进行生害攻击的T来说，这些生物防害专家简直就是最头痛的对手。 安静但致命！

name: 军士长炸弹森 | 特警
nameZh: 军士长炸弹森 | 特警
descriptionEn: Tyler Bobson earned his moniker after becoming SWAT's go-to officer for efficient Explosive Ordnance Disposal. With his uncanny ability to locate even the most well hidden IEDs, Bombson's keen hearing is outclassed only by the noble Greater Wax Moth. Yeah, I heard that.
descriptionZh: 泰勒·炸弹森在特警队中凭借高超的排爆水平，为他赢得了自己的绰号。他具有敏锐到不可思议的听觉，哪怕是再隐蔽的爆炸装置，都可以精准定位，可能只有大蜡螟的听力才能超过他。 是的！我已经锁定了炸弹！

name: 化学防害专家 | 特警
nameZh: 化学防害专家 | 特警
descriptionEn: The SWAT Chemical Hazard Specialists are able to survive and succeed in toxic environment operations for hours at a time. Where others run away, they run in. Feels like home.
descriptionZh: 这位特警队里的化学防害专家，可以在有毒环境中成功连续生存数小时。他们是逆行者，当别人拼命逃离时，他们往往要冲进去。 如此熟悉的感觉！

name: 红衫列赞 | 军刀
descriptionEn: An expert grenadier and the once-celebrated author of The Joy of Preparedness, Rezan the Redshirt is Sabre's self-appointed Head of Operations. Over time, Rezan has learned to control his fiery temper—now he wears his explosive rage on his sleeves. I take great pride in my work.
descriptionZh: 列赞是一位专业的投弹手兼前畅销书作家，他自诩为军刀组织里的行动负责人。 渐渐地，雷赞已经学会了控制自己火爆的脾气，现在，他衣袖上的臂章记录了他过去的暴脾气。 我工作，我自豪。

name: 残酷的达里尔爵士（迈阿密）| 专业人士
nameEn: Sir Bloody Miami Darryl | The Professionals
nameZh: 残酷的达里尔爵士（迈阿密）| 专业人士
descriptionEn: The leader of 'The Professionals' can be described as cocky, wisecracking, and scarily indifferent with regards to the suffering of others. He would say he's just a bloke—a bloke that likes to have a bit of fun on the weekend with the local armed tax collectors. He downplays the severity of any heavy situations that come his way, even if he's the last man standing, riddled with bullets, with only seconds left to blow the safe. This white hockey mask and floral shirt were popular choices during his Vice phase. Got my hair combed back and my sunglasses on.
descriptionZh: 这位臭名昭著的打劫团伙“专业人士”的领导者，傲慢、聪明又极其冷漠，特别是在对他人的痛苦方面。他自称自己只是一个喜欢在周末给当地武装税务人员找乐子的家伙。他对面临的任何问题都嗤之以鼻，不管那个问题有多么严重，即使这意味着他在火拼后孤身一人，身体被打成筛子，或炸开保险箱的时间只剩几秒，他也完全不在乎。 这个白色冰球面具和花衬衫是他恶人生涯中最爱的装扮。 梳个大背头，带个太阳镜

name: 飞贼波兹曼 | 专业人士
nameZh: 飞贼波兹曼 | 专业人士
descriptionEn: Weird, quirky, unhinged; a few words that describe The Professionals' safecracker and technical mastermind. When she is not mumbling to herself about the flawed assumptions inherent within the profit maximization paradox, Safecracker serves as a morally questionable but highly efficient 'fundraising expert.' She enjoys short walks on pavement, the sound of cable ties being fastened, and testing explosive prototypes under immense pressure. Don't blow it. DO blow the bomb though, okay? We do want that.
descriptionZh: 古怪、另类、混乱，这些词语都能很好地描述这位专业人士，身兼保险箱窃贼与技术大脑于一体。当她没有嘟囔那些关于利润最大化悖论中存在的错误假设时，她还算是效率最高的五个“道德有问题”的“筹款专家”之一。她喜欢在人行道上散步，喜欢捆电缆的声音，喜欢在高强度压力下测试爆炸试验品。 别浪费时间，赶快引爆炸弹，好吗！我们就想要这么干！

name: 小凯夫 | 专业人士
descriptionEn: The Professional who makes heavy weapons look weightless, Little Kev is the soft spoken 'little' brother of Sir Bloody Darryl. His older brother's bodyguard since age 5, Little Kev developed a knack for quelling 'people problems' before they arise. Sir Darryl assigned him Human Resources Manager for the entire Professionals organization. We're getting this done either way.
descriptionZh: 小凯夫身材高大魁梧，是唯一一个足以令手中的重型武器看起来都像小玩具的“专业人士”，他也被称为残酷的达里尔爵士的“小”弟弟。他从5岁开始担任哥哥的贴身保镖，悟出了一套在“问题”萌芽之前就将其扼杀在摇篮中的办法。在达里尔爵士发现了弟弟的这个天赋后，便指派他担任整个组织里的人力资源经理。 无论如何，我们都要完成这个任务。

name: 出逃的萨莉 | 专业人士
nameZh: 出逃的萨莉 | 专业人士
descriptionEn: Small enough to hide in plain sight but loud enough to frighten the biggest enemies, Getaway Sally is The Professionals' first pick for tight quarter Wealth Acquisition Projects. A talented weaver of controlled chaos, Getaway Sally has the improvisational skills to turn the tables on any dire heist and hostage situations. Now you don't see me, and now you still don't.
descriptionZh: 出逃的萨莉是“专业人士”组织里执行机密行动的不二选择，她小到可以藏在任何地方，但声音大到可以唬住任何敌人。她是天才的混乱处理专员，无论多么糟糕的抢劫或劫持情况，她都能借助自己的应变能力，迅速而从容的扭转乾坤。 我又跳出来了, 我又进来了! 打我啊！

name: 老K | 专业人士
descriptionEn: In his 'Wealth Acquisition Specialist' application form, Number K wrote the letter 'K' in every number field, but his talent with handguns made him more than qualified for the position. Number K keeps the details of his life private—none of his colleagues have seen his face—making him one of The Professionals' most feared heist managers. Don't count us down. Just say go.
descriptionZh: 在“财务获取专家”工作申请表上，老K在任何需要填数字的地方，都只是简单的写上字母K。没人知道这代表什么。尽管如此，老K的手枪水平令他完全胜任这个职位。他非常强调自己的隐私——甚至没有任何一个同事看过他的脸——这使他成为最令人闻风丧胆的“专业人士”之一。 别把我们算在内。咱说走就走。

name: 残酷的达里尔爵士（沉默）| 专业人士
nameEn: Sir Bloody Silent Darryl | The Professionals
nameZh: 残酷的达里尔爵士（沉默）| 专业人士
descriptionEn: The leader of 'The Professionals' can be described as cocky, wisecracking, and scarily indifferent with regards to the suffering of others. He would say he's just a bloke—a bloke that likes to have a bit of fun on the weekend with the local armed tax collectors. He downplays the severity of any heavy situations that come his way, even if he's the last man standing, riddled with bullets, with only seconds left to blow the safe. This 'Vow of Silence' mask was Darryl's response to organizational complaints about his logorrhea. ...
descriptionZh: 这位臭名昭著的打劫团伙“专业人士”的领导者，傲慢、聪明又极其冷漠，特别是在对他人的痛苦方面。他自称自己只是一个喜欢在周末给当地武装税务人员找乐子的家伙。他对面临的任何问题都嗤之以鼻，不管那个问题有多么严重，即使这意味着他在火拼后孤身一人，身体被打成筛子，或炸开保险箱的时间只剩几秒，他也完全不在乎。 这个“沉默之誓”面具代表了达里尔对组织嫌弃他聒噪的一种回应。 ……

name: 残酷的达里尔爵士（头盖骨）| 专业人士
nameEn: Sir Bloody Skullhead Darryl | The Professionals
nameZh: 残酷的达里尔爵士（头盖骨）| 专业人士
descriptionEn: The leader of 'The Professionals' can be described as cocky, wisecracking, and scarily indifferent with regards to the suffering of others. He would say he's just a bloke—a bloke that likes to have a bit of fun on the weekend with the local armed tax collectors. He downplays the severity of any heavy situations that come his way, even if he's the last man standing, riddled with bullets, with only seconds left to blow the safe. This black mask has been painted with a white skull, a useful bit of intimidation back when The Professionals were just getting started. Are we gonna bloody finish this thing or what?!
descriptionZh: 这位臭名昭著的打劫团伙“专业人士”的领导者，傲慢、聪明又极其冷漠，特别是在对他人的痛苦方面。他自称自己只是一个喜欢在周末给当地武装税务人员找乐子的家伙。他对面临的任何问题都嗤之以鼻，不管那个问题有多么严重，即使这意味着他在火拼后孤身一人，身体被打成筛子，或炸开保险箱的时间只剩几秒，他也完全不在乎。 这个黑色面具带有白色骷髅纹饰，在“专业人士”组织成立初期，这些骷髅纹饰还是相当有震慑效果的。 我们要把这件事干完还是怎样？

name: 残酷的达里尔爵士（皇家）| 专业人士
nameEn: Sir Bloody Darryl Royale | The Professionals
nameZh: 残酷的达里尔爵士（皇家）| 专业人士
descriptionEn: The leader of 'The Professionals' can be described as cocky, wisecracking, and scarily indifferent with regards to the suffering of others. He would say he's just a bloke—a bloke that likes to have a bit of fun on the weekend with the local armed tax collectors. He downplays the severity of any heavy situations that come his way, even if he's the last man standing, riddled with bullets, with only seconds left to blow the safe. This gold mask with a crown stencil commemorates The Professionals' first visit to Monaco. Do you know what they call a cheeseburger in Monaco?
descriptionZh: 这位臭名昭著的打劫团伙“专业人士”的领导者，傲慢、聪明又极其冷漠，特别是在对他人的痛苦方面。他自称自己只是一个喜欢在周末给当地武装税务人员找乐子的家伙。他对面临的任何问题都嗤之以鼻，不管那个问题有多么严重，即使这意味着他在火拼后孤身一人，身体被打成筛子，或炸开保险箱的时间只剩几秒，他也完全不在乎。 这个黄金面具带有皇冠图案，是为了纪念当年“专业人士”的首次摩纳哥之行。 你知道摩纳哥人管芝士汉堡叫啥吗？
